name: RhodeCode
description: RhodeCode — Self-hosted code repository management platform supporting Git, Mercurial, and SVN with code review tools.

seo.title: RhodeCode — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: RhodeCode: RhodeCode — Self-hosted code repository management platform supporting Git, Mercurial, and SVN with code review tools.

when_to_use: Self-hosted Git, Mercurial, and SVN code hosting
Code review workflow with inline commenting tools
Fine-grained repository access controls and permissions

pros: Handles Git, Mercurial, and SVN in one server
cons: Community edition is limited vs enterprise
review.verdict: A niche but solid on-prem forge for teams still running Mercurial or mixed VCS stacks.
review.best_for: Regulated or legacy shops needing self-hosted Git+Mercurial+SVN in one tool.
review.not_for: Greenfield Git-only teams who'd be happier on GitLab or Gitea.
